channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: AI data center gold rush sparks debate over impact on Bitcoin mining
item.description: Crypto trader Ran Neuner said Bitcoin could be at risk if AI continues to pull miners away from the network, but others disagree.

item.title: SEC drops case against BitClout founder with prejudice
item.description: The US Department of Justice has filed for dismissal of its case against BitClout founder Nader Al-Naji, after “reassessment of the evidentiary record."

item.title: Balaji calls for more ‘crypto tools’ for refugees amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The former Coinbase CTO says the crypto industry should build more financial tools for refugees and stateless people as conflicts and migration increase worldwide.

item.title: Australian Senate panel backs crypto regulation framework
item.description: The Senate Economics Legislation Committee said the proposed legislation will modernize digital assets regulatory framework.

item.title: The regulatory provisions outlined in the US Digital Asset Market Structure Clarity Act, otherwise known as the CLARITY Act, threaten to give large financial institutions control over crypto, according to Dr. Friederike Ernst, co-founder of the Gnosis blockchain pr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFA4TVZiMmJYd25oSUllSjJVVEVXR0tKOVp6TjF5a093b3BTcHNobzdQYnZhTFdHeTNHVVhxMWhLbHNxN1htdmZTS0ZjMmVyYzc0V1F4QUg0V2hzWFFkNmNZYWJkZUs?oc=5" target="_blank">The regulatory provisions outli…

item.title: FATF 報告書が示すステーブルコイン規制の転換点：流通市場モニタリングの時代へ
item.description: ※この記事は自動翻訳されています。正確な内容につきましては原文をご参照ください。 要約 84% という現実： ステーブルコインは今や、不正な暗号資産トランザクションの 84% を占めています。普及の拡大に伴い、ステーブルコインに特化したコンプライアンスが喫緊の規制課題となっています。 「流通市場」の時代： 規制の焦点は、入出金の監視にとどまりません。FATF は、個人ウォレットを介した P2P トランザクションを含むステーブルコインのライフサイクル全体の監視を求めており、発…

item.title: XRP climbs 3% past $1.47 as breakout extends on broad bitcoin-led move
item.description: Volume jumped more than 250% during the move, with traders watching whether former resistance now turns into support.

item.title: Bitcoin briefly tops $74,000 as ether, sol, ada gains as much as 6% in Monday surge
item.description: Majors posted broad gains on Monday as oil eased from highs, two tankers sailed through the Strait of Hormuz for the first time since the war began, and Trump said the U.S. was talking to Iran.

item.title: Australia warns of AI, ‘finfluencers’ as Gen Z crypto ownership reaches 23%
item.description: Australia’s securities regulator said two-thirds of Gen Z are using social media to make decisions about their financial future, leading to “riskier” financial decisions.

item.title: Early Ethereum builder billΞ.eth( @0xbilly) is also buying $ETH! Wallet 0xf792, linked to @0xbilly, spent $17.46M to buy 7,769 $ETH at an average price of $2,248 in the past 2 hours. intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5tWjZJTTNtcDdBMFhRZmtiaGNXUTljMnFpNlhoRHJRMjhRbkhnVk1HRUhrVVpuQUw5Vk5Qb3B3VlUtZ1ExcUtkZXExa01sVUVUMjlOUUxjQllXNkNNMW5hcnln?oc=5" target="_blank">Early Ethereum builder billΞ.eth( …

item.title: Australia Senate Panel Backs Crypto Framework in Latest Regulatory Push
item.description: The proposal would bring crypto platforms and custodians under Australia’s financial-services law, requiring operators that hold client tokens to obtain licences and meet new asset-safeguarding standards.

item.title: WLFI investors nod 6-month token lock-up rule in governance tweak
item.description: WLFI token holders must stake their tokens for at least 180 days to retain voting privileges under the recently passed proposal.

item.title: Bitcoin's price trades above its 50-day average as bullish move gathers pace
item.description: Bitcoin's convincing move above its key average indicates a strengthening of the bullish momentum.

item.title: Crypto trading firm Blockfills has filed for bankruptcy
item.description: The institutional crypto lender filed for bankruptcy after suspending withdrawals, incurring about $75 million in losses and facing a lawsuit alleging misuse of customer funds.

item.title: US ban on stablecoin yield could see others fill the void: Ledger exec
item.description: Ledger’s Asia-Pacific lead, Takatoshi Shibayama, has added his take as crypto and banks continue to debate whether to allow third-party platforms to offer stablecoin yields.

item.title: JUST IN: $115,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9lQzAxYnpzRkRjTVJJcHBEMGkzeUs0SVJHVXpVUmExRWFiUEk0N2tHcmUyX2taRXJWNmZ6SDVMR0tIQm9GX0VLSWxFS19YOHhtSnkxcHk1V0l0VHd1S0FxRzBn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $115,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: 72% of subsea cables would need to fail to impact Bitcoin, study shows
item.description: The past 11 years have shown that Bitcoin has been resilient to random intercontinental subsea cable failures, but could be susceptible to targeted attacks.

item.title: BlockFills Entities File Bankruptcy After Withdrawals Halted, Court Froze Bitcoin
item.description: The filings come as the company faces a lawsuit alleging it commingled client crypto assets and refused to return client funds.

item.title: Embattled crypto lender BlockFills files for bankruptcy in US
item.description: BlockFills has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in the US after suspending deposits and withdrawals last month, citing deteriorating crypto market conditions.

item.title: Traders Flip Senate Control Bet as Democrats Overtake Republicans on Kalshi, Polymarket
item.description: Prediction markets tracking Senate control have swung sharply in recent weeks as traders reassess political risk amid escalating tensions in Iran.

item.title: Crypto trading and lending firm BlockFills (operating entity: Reliz Ltd) has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection in Delaware, listing $50–100 million in assets and $100–500 million in liabilities. The move aims to restructure and stabilize operations after su - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9fNWxWMlVGNnVhSjJQbjlvUVZSQ3ZfN2ZOZ0xwbDZhcndybm1HRVczd2NRX0V3bFNwRm1VejNqTFllNks0UlpOZlFnbGt2Vy1vOVFFMllqbDZ4YkFDQkZxbmFlOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto trading and lending firm …

item.title: Aave to launch ‘Aave Shield’ after $50M token swap mishap
item.description: In a post-mortem of the incident, Aave clarified it was not slippage, but an illiquid market that caused the trader to lose over $50 million while swapping USDT for AAVE.

item.title: Bitcoin Advances as Oil Jumps Toward $100 on Further Middle East Strikes
item.description: Markets steadied after a volatile weekend, even as oil rose, as traders weighed U.S. strikes on Iranian targets.

item.title: ⚡️ NEW: Vitalik Buterin proposes merging Ethereum's consensus and execution layers into one unified code structure to simplify node setup. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1QRTFDVlFiSE84b1BQYTNQQ3ktdmplTTR1TndwUkdWbEVhaGZMX093Mlh1NURKMVpnUHlCdzU0Nm5QZ05jNV9SRmRsZy1WUjU3V1FaRFB3SExlVm5HNjVWVk1lLWg?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NEW: Vitalik Buterin propose…

item.title: Gold tumbles below 5K as Bitcoin jump to $73K. The regime shift divergence is accelerating - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1oR25sYThzdXBnaFFSWUVBR2cyLXhFSjZ0ZXlJbG5uUjhfOTFUR05lUG9hbFp1UHpXOXpfM3ZHWnUxUWxmNlAyRUNwQnhuemFReFFUUTRKckxhY1pJNU1R?oc=5" target="_blank">Gold tumbles below 5K as Bitcoin jump …

item.title: JUST IN: $73,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: JUST IN: $73,000 Bitcoin

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: CLARITY Act risks handing crypto to centralized players: Gnosis exec
item.description: The legislation assumes that all crypto activity must pass through financial intermediaries licensed by the US government, warns Gnosis co-founder.

item.title: You Can Control an AI Agent's Crypto Spending With Ledger Hardware Wallets and MoonPay
item.description: The Ledger hardware wallet integration lets users approve AI-driven crypto transactions on-device while keeping private keys secure.

item.title: 🚨 FUN FACT: Out of roughly 52,500 Bitcoin blocks mined each year, only about 20–25 are found by solo miners, making it one of the rarest wins in crypto. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1qTk5ib3VzM1VBSEExcE9rYkNiS056OWl0LUp2Qy1YQjN1b0hBMTBQZHhYNDkzTldKQ0Q2Yzl4ZjJvMnp1YS1PZDF3RDdpMjF0R2xwbzVnTG5VendLbUE1S3pEejY?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 FUN FACT: Out of roughly 52,…

item.title: The SEC and CFTC join hands: State of Crypto
item.description: The SEC and CFTC signed a memorandum of understanding to do a better job providing a combined regulatory approach to the digital asset sector.

item.title: Venus Protocol hit by $3.7M ‘supply cap’ attack
item.description: The threat actor manipulated the platform by using Thena tokens to bypass the maximum supply cap and borrow several different digital assets.

item.title: Crypto’s age of hype is over, making way for the real infrastructure to be built
item.description: Nikolic challenges a recent CoinDesk op-ed, declaring "crypto's rock 'n' roll era is over," and argues that it’s the best shift for the industry’s builders.

item.title: We Tested Utopai's PAI: The Best Long-Form AI Video Generator Today?
item.description: Utopai Studios built a professional-grade cinematic engine that produces stunning long-form AI video—but its learning curve can be punishing.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
item.description: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.

item.title: Bitcoin set for best week since September 2025 as correlation with tech stocks weakens
item.description: Bitcoin is outperforming equities and gold since the Middle East conflict began, as institutional inflows return while broader market sentiment remains cautious.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: Surviving a Financial Crisis Requires Downsizing Rather Than Buying Bitcoin On March 10, 2026, during an interview with Natalie Brunell, Arthur Hayes stated that for high earners who suddenly lose their $250,000 salaries while carrying massi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE50UEkwSFQ3WXhTckY5WXFBT0ludmlwOENZbTFlUk9OTkUzb2FPdjF1Z01BNWkwTmdtelhLcTZxd0NUeGJVZGJaSHBCR21UMUJHSTY3aWIxMEU2QjBMVzZRaWxpRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Arthur Hayes: Surviving a Financ…

item.title: Here is why Nasdaq and owner of NYSE are putting the $126 trillion equity market on blockchain
item.description: The race for the "everything exchange" makes Wall Street operators and crypto exchanges rivals and partners at the same time.

item.title: How Florida's Stablecoin Bill Mirrors 'Big Brother' Tools Outlawed Under Ron DeSantis' CDBC Ban
item.description: The governor, who opposes CBDCs, appears poised to sign a regulatory framework for stablecoins in Florida.

item.title: Bitcoin price teases key support reclaim with weekly close above $70K
item.description: Bitcoin edged toward an important weekly close above $70,000 that would reclaim an important 200-week trend line.

item.title: How Bitcoin and gold reacted differently to the Iran war shock
item.description: During the Iran conflict, gold attracted safe-haven demand, while Bitcoin’s reaction reflected liquidity conditions and broader market sentiment rather than acting as a classic crisis hedge.

item.title: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan revisits $1 million bitcoin — analysts agree but debate his timeline
item.description: Hougan says bitcoin could reach that milestone if it captures a larger share of the global store-of-value market, though analysts say it would likely take years of institutional adoption and macro shifts.

item.title: Forensic analysis uncovers draft of $5M deal tied to Milei’s Libra promotion: Report
item.description: Forensic analysis of lobbyist Mauricio Novelli’s phone reportedly uncovered a draft document outlining a $5 million payment tied to Argentina's president's promotion of the Libra token.

item.title: On-chain data shows Venus Protocol was suspected to suffer a flash-loan attack. The attacker address 0x1a35…6231 obtained about 20 BTC, 1.5 million CAKE, and 200 BNB, totaling over $3.7 million, after using a large amount of THE as collateral on Venus t - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Stretch the Orange Dots." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9pVGF5dmxZeHhJOGNGT0Jvd1BlTm9ibjF3djF4MHQ3RnVILWJsRUFQZ05SMDJXRlZEUy1BN3hrYTA4NEVfZ0VGOVBsdzVtV1VkZElYVndydWlPVTBfdk14TVln?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: What Is AGI? The AI Goal Everyone Talks About But No One Can Clearly Define
item.description: Experts say artificial general intelligence lacks a clear definition or arrival point, despite promises from Silicon Valley and abroad.

item.title: Visa is ready for AI agents. So is Coinbase. They're building very different internets
item.description: The next trillion-dollar payments network won't have a checkout page. No card number, no CVV, no human at the keyboard. Just machines paying machines, thousands of times a second, for fractions of a cent.

item.title: AI agents are quietly rewriting prediction market trading
item.description: Valory co-founder David Minarsch says autonomous agents running on the Olas protocol are giving retail traders a 24/7, strategy-driven edge on platforms like Polymarket.

item.title: Erik Voorhees( @ErikVoorhees), an early #Bitcoin supporter and founder of ShapeShift, is buying back $ETH after a one-year break. One year ago, he sold 12,886 $ETH($42.83M) at $3,324. In the past 5 days, he has spent 17.75M $USDT to buy back 8,576 $ - x.com

item.title: Stablecoin uncertainty could hurt banks more than crypto firms: Expert
item.description: Regulatory uncertainty around stablecoins may disadvantage banks, as crypto firms continue expanding while financial institutions wait for clearer rules.

item.title: BitMine is glad to support the efforts of the Ethereum Foundation @ethereumfndn by acquiring their ETH for a mutually agreed upon price - $BMNR continues to stack $ETH @fundstrat - x.com

item.title: The recent correction on Friday on #Bitcoin was essentially just risk-off appetite to not be having positions going into the weekend. Nothing else. Markets are turning back upwards again, probably we'll see a slight pullback later today for CME gap closing appet - x.com

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran confirms ongoing military cooperation with Russia and China, calls them "strategic partners." World war... - x.com

item.title: Altseason is dead, expect shorter cycles and ‘violent’ rotations: Crypto exec
item.description: Only a few crypto tokens will experience price rallies and asymmetric upside, while broad altcoin market rallies are a thing of the past.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sells $10.2M worth of ETH to BitMine in OTC deal
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation completed a $10.2 million OTC sale of 5,000 ETH to BitMine as part of its treasury management strategy to fund operations and ecosystem development.

item.title: Bitcoin whales are starting to accumulate again at $71K: Santiment
item.description: Santiment says the recent uptick in Bitcoin whale accumulation is a "positive reversal," and the platform is watching for retail selling to confirm a potential market bottom.

item.title: Bitcoin sold off first when the U.S.-Iran war began. Two weeks later, it's outperforming nearly everything
item.description: Each escalation in the Iran conflict has been larger than the last, but each bitcoin drawdown has been getting smaller.

item.title: 📊 BITCOIN: It took $BTC 11 months to climb from $70K to $125K, and just 5 months to fall back to $70K. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9aa2paWXltU1NaejlScXdndU9Hd3ItZzVmMXB3eUFOd002OUw1c3lqbVB4SjFwaVgzRFQ4WTQ0cVB3eU9VUjlTR2ZsYWloekZQbGxraURTRnR5Y2NkUHZDNUhiVVM?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 BITCOIN: It took $BTC 11 mon…

item.title: Crypto broker Bitpanda bets on banks and tokenization to expand globally ahead of IPO plans
item.description: The Vienna-based crypto broker eyes emerging markets, teaming up with institutions rather than competing with local exchanges, said Vishal Sacheendran, VP of global markets strategy and operations.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys $10.2 Million in ETH Directly From Ethereum Foundation
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation said Saturday that it sold 5,000 ETH for approximately $10.2 million to Tom Lee's BitMine Immersion Technologies.
